import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = list.len(words)
    mut best = ""
    mut best_len = -1
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match words.get(i)
      when Some(w)
        let wl = string.len(w)
        if wl > best_len
          best = w
          best_len = wl
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("longest=#{best}")
  when None
    println("longest=")
  end
end
